stateFamilies.label: Intake
stateFamilies.summary: Phase 3 handoff has been acknowledged but the booking kernel has not yet opened search truth.

stateFamilies.label: Search
stateFamilies.summary: Local booking is live, the search policy is current, and the shell is moving through offer discovery and slot choice.

stateFamilies.label: Commit
stateFamilies.summary: A chosen slot is crossing reservation, confirmation, or reconciliation truth boundaries.

stateFamilies.label: Continuation
stateFamilies.summary: Local booking could not settle directly and now depends on waitlist, callback, hub, or explicit failure truth.

stateFamilies.label: Manage and Close
stateFamilies.summary: An authoritative appointment exists or the booking branch is durably finished.

states.summary: The booking branch exists only as a direct-resolution handoff and proposed lineage child link.
states.dominantAuthority: Phase 3 BookingIntent plus the proposed LineageCaseLink.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Phase 3 BookingIntent is unsuperseded, ownership fences are current, and the booking link is still the proposed child for the request lineage.
states.routeCue: Summary-only booking launch card inside the patient or staff shell.

states.summary: The case has validated current booking capability, route publication, trust, and identity posture but has not opened a live slot search yet.
states.entryPredicateSummary: The bound capability tuple still matches route, publication, trust, and governing-object posture for the active audience.
states.routeCue: Capability gate summary with allowed next actions.

states.summary: The case is actively running local search under one SearchPolicy and one current capability tuple.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Capability is live for search and the case owns one active SearchPolicy.
states.routeCue: Search-first workspace with calm loading, empty, or partial posture inside the same shell.

states.summary: Current snapshot and offer session expose a lawful set of local choices.
states.dominantAuthority: OfferSession plus ReservationTruthProjection plus rank proof.
states.entryPredicateSummary: A live OfferSession exists and the linked snapshot remains selectable for the active case version and policy bundle.
states.routeCue: Offer list or calendar with explicit rank disclosure and truthful hold wording.

states.summary: The shell holds a chosen slot candidate but not yet a fresh revalidation outcome.
states.dominantAuthority: OfferSession selection tuple and the selected anchor tuple hash.
states.entryPredicateSummary: One offered slot is selected and its tuple hash still resolves to the same canonical slot identity.
states.routeCue: Selection state that preserves the chosen slot anchor across same-shell child routes.

states.summary: The selected slot is being checked against supplier truth and the original SearchPolicy before commit can start.
states.dominantAuthority: BookingTransaction preflight, SearchPolicy, and current capability tuple.
states.entryPredicateSummary: A chosen slot is undergoing the authoritative supplier or local preflight check for the same policy bundle.
states.routeCue: Selected slot remains visible while writable mutation is temporarily paused.

states.summary: A commit path is in flight and must not be mistaken for final booking.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Reservation and request fences are live, dispatch has started, and authoritative outcome is still pending.
states.routeCue: Pending confirmation wording stays summary-first and suppresses false calmness.

states.summary: The commit path has authoritative booking proof and can now open management posture.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Confirmation truth is confirmed and an AppointmentRecord exists on the same lineage.
states.routeCue: Booked summary transitions into management inside the same shell.

states.summary: The supplier has accepted or is processing the booking but durable confirmation truth is still pending.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Confirmation truth state is confirmation_pending and the same transaction chain remains current.
states.routeCue: Chosen slot or booked summary stays visible until authoritative settlement lands.

states.summary: Supplier truth is ambiguous or disputed and the case must preserve provenance while freezing mutation.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Confirmation truth state is reconciliation_required and a reconciliation gate is attached to the same lineage.
states.routeCue: Same-shell recovery posture with explicit reconciliation explanation.

states.summary: The case is still lawfully waiting for local supply and has not yet crossed into callback or hub fallback.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Active WaitlistEntry exists, offerabilityState is waitlist_safe or at_risk, and required fallback route remains stay_local_waitlist.
states.routeCue: Waitlist truth remains visible with deadline risk and dominant next step.

states.summary: Local booking has durably transferred to the hub path.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Current fallback obligation requires hub and a hub coordination child link exists for the same booking lineage.
states.routeCue: Read-only provenance plus governed handoff status.

states.summary: Local booking has durably transferred to governed callback handling.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Current fallback obligation requires callback and the linked CallbackCase plus CallbackExpectationEnvelope exist on the same fallback fence.
states.routeCue: Read-only provenance plus callback expectation summary.

states.summary: The current local booking branch ended without an active waitlist or fallback continuation.
states.entryPredicateSummary: No active continuation path remains and the current booking attempt has failed under the authoritative outcome chain.
states.routeCue: Recovery-only branch summary with no local writable controls.

states.summary: An authoritative appointment exists and the case has entered its manage lifecycle.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Appointment exists with authoritative confirmation proof and manage posture is not hidden.
states.routeCue: Appointment summary with manage, cancel, or reschedule child routes.

states.summary: The booking branch is durably finished, but request closure remains a coordinator decision.
states.dominantAuthority: BookingCase branch settlement only; not request closure.
states.entryPredicateSummary: Case-level work is finished and no further booking mutation is legal for the active lineage branch.
states.routeCue: Summary-only review or appointment history view.

authorityAxes.label: Capability truth
authorityAxes.notes: Search or manage eligibility must not be inferred from BookingCase.status.

authorityAxes.label: Reservation and hold truth
authorityAxes.notes: Holds, exclusivity, and offer expiry stay on reservation truth, not case state.

authorityAxes.label: Confirmation truth
authorityAxes.notes: Booked wording, manage exposure, and artifact readiness derive from confirmation truth only.

authorityAxes.label: Manage posture
authorityAxes.notes: Cancel, reschedule, and reminder posture are separate from top-level case state.

authorityAxes.label: Route publication and recovery
authorityAxes.notes: Same-shell writability is publication-governed and can degrade without changing the booking workflow state.

transitions.predicate: Current BookingIntent is unsuperseded, its proposed LineageCaseLink is still current for the request lineage, and request ownership fences are valid for case creation.
transitions.sourceRef: blueprint/phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4A. Booking contract, case model, and state machine

transitions.predicate: BookingCapabilityResolution.capabilityState is live_self_service or live_staff_assist for the active audience, binding hashes remain current, and route publication plus trust posture still match the capability tuple.
transitions.sourceRef: blueprint/phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4A. Booking contract, case model, and state machine

transitions.predicate: A live OfferSession exists on the active BookingCase version, policy bundle, capability binding, and selectable snapshot.

transitions.predicate: Active WaitlistEntry exists, WaitlistDeadlineEvaluation.offerabilityState is waitlist_safe or at_risk, and WaitlistFallbackObligation.requiredFallbackRoute remains stay_local_waitlist.
transitions.sourceRef: blueprint/phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4A. Booking contract, case model, and state machine

transitions.predicate: Current WaitlistFallbackObligation.requiredFallbackRoute equals callback and the same fallback fence already owns a linked CallbackCase plus CallbackExpectationEnvelope.
transitions.sourceRef: blueprint/phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4A. Booking contract, case model, and state machine

transitions.predicate: Current WaitlistFallbackObligation.requiredFallbackRoute equals hub and the same booking lineage already owns a durably created HubCoordinationCase.
transitions.sourceRef: blueprint/phase-4-the-booking-engine.md#4A. Booking contract, case model, and state machine

transitions.predicate: The current local booking attempt ended without an active continuation path, waitlist, or durable fallback transfer.

prohibitedInterpretations: BookingCase.status may not imply capability state, reservation truth, or confirmation truth by itself.
Booking child routes are same-shell child states, not detached mini-apps.
BookingCase may not close the request directly.
Late triage supersession or wrong-patient freeze may not be ignored after booking opens.
